mapper.select: SELECT categoryNo, categoryName, categoryDescribe, categoryImagePath FROM category WHERE categoryNo < 6 ORDER BY categoryNo
mapper.update: update board set readCount = readCount + 1 where boardNo = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: insert into board(boardNo, fk_categoryNo, boardName, boardContent, createdAtBoard, updatedAtBoard, readCount, fk_id, boardDeleted) values(board_seq.nextval, 3, #{boardName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{boardContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, default, default, default, #{fk_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, default)

insert into board(boardNo, fk_categoryNo, boardName, boardContent, createdAtBoard, updatedAtBoard, readCount, fk_id, boardFileName, boardFileOriginName, boardDeleted) values(board_seq.nextval, 3, #{boardName}, #{boardContent}, #{createdAtBoard}, #{updatedAtBoard}, #{readCount}, #{fk_id}, #{boardFileName}, #{boardFileOriginName}, #{boardDeleted})
insert into comments(commentNo, fk_id, fk_name, content, createdAtComment, updateAtComment, fk_boardNo) values(comment_seq.nextval, #{fk_id}, #{fk_name}, #{content}, default, default, #{fk_boardNo})
